description:
Pomodorolm is a simple, lightweight, good looking and configurable pomodoro tracker with tray icon.

Pomodorolm is a simple, lightweight, good looking and configurable pomodoro tracker with tray icon built with Tauri. You can change its look and feel by using themes and you if none suits you, you can create your own theme. All sessions durations are configurable and you can choose to play sounds too (ticking sound, end of session and so on). You can even display notifications if you want to.
🎉 What's Changed
🐛 Bug Fixes
- Volume setting should be optional for backward compat (#246)
- Hide volume slider on mouse leave (#247)
⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks
- Create dependabot.yml (#232)
Full Changelog: app-v0.9.0...app-v0.9.1
⬇️ Download
See the assets to download this version and install.
Available builds:
- Mac OS X: M1 and above (aarch64.dmg, aarch64.app) and Intel based macs (x64.dmg, x64.app)
- Windows: x64 .exe and .msi
- Linux: .deb and .AppImage
